---
page-layout: full
---

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="28%"}
![](img/SDB1.jpg){.rounded-circle width=220}

### Connect

{{< iconify fa6-brands google-scholar >}} [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID)

{{< iconify fa6-brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/santoshdbhosale)

{{< iconify fa6-brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/santoshdbhosale)

{{< iconify fa6-solid envelope >}} [Email](mailto:santoshdbhosale@gmail.com)

:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="68%"}

## Hi, I'm Santosh D. Bhosale

A **pharmacist-turned-proteomics scientist** with a PhD and 15+ years of experience spanning wet-lab mass spectrometry, computational proteomics, and — most recently — AI/ML for drug discovery. I bridge deep domain biology with scalable data pipelines.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-3 .text-center}
### 20+
*Peer-reviewed publications*
:::

::: {.g-col-3 .text-center}
### 15+
*Years research experience*
:::

::: {.g-col-3 .text-center}
### 10+
*Peer-reviewed manuscripts*
:::

::: {.g-col-3 .text-center}
### 1
*Patent application (EU & USA)*
:::

:::

> **Currently:** Product Manager I (Growth) at **Partex.ai (Formerly Innoplexus Consulting Pvt. Ltd.), Pune** — leading biomarker module development for omics data, integrating Llama & Gemini LLMs with Python pipelines to accelerate pharmaceutical drug discovery.

:::

:::

---

## What I Do - Proteomics Meets Artificial Intelligence

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
### 🔬 Proteomics Research
Mass spectrometry-based proteomics (DIA/DDA), PTM enrichment (phospho, glyco, cysteine), biomarker discovery from serum/plasma, label-free & isobaric quantification (TMT/iTRAQ).
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### 🤖 AI/ML for Drug Discovery
LLM-based data extraction (Llama, Gemini) from ClinicalTrials.gov & PubChem, Python automation for biocuration, ML pipeline development, agile collaboration with data engineers.
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
### 📦 Product & Project Management
End-to-end delivery of omics projects (SOW to deliverable), cross-functional team leadership, biomarker module product ownership, stakeholder and vendor management.
:::

:::

---

## Career Highlights

| Year | Role | Organisation | Location |
|------|------|-------------|----------|
| 2025–present | **Product Manager I – Growth** | Partex.ai (Formerly Innoplexus Consulting Pvt. Ltd.) | Pune, India |
| 2024 | Associate Scientific Manager | Partex.ai (Formerly Innoplexus Consulting Pvt. Ltd.) | Pune, India |
| 2023–2024 | Associate Biomedical Scientist | Cedars-Sinai Precision Biomarker Laboratories | Los Angeles, USA |
| 2020–2022 | Postdoctoral Researcher | University of Southern Denmark | Odense, Denmark |
| 2018–2019 | Postdoctoral Researcher | University of Turku – Turku Bioscience | Turku, Finland |
| 2012–2018 | **PhD** | University of Turku | Turku, Finland |

---

## Selected Publications

- Hendricks NG, **Bhosale SD**, et al. (2024). *An Inflection Point in High-Throughput Proteomics with Orbitrap Astral: Analysis of Biofluids, Cells, and Tissues.* **J Proteome Res**

- **Bhosale SD**, Moulder R, et al. (2024). *Serum proteomics of mother-infant dyads carrying HLA-conferred type 1 diabetes risk.* **iScience**

- Moulder R, **Bhosale SD**, et al. (2018). *Analysis of the plasma proteome using iTRAQ and TMT-based isobaric labeling.* **Mass Spectrometry Reviews**

- **Bhosale SD**, Moulder R, et al. (2018). *Serum Proteomic Profiling to Identify Biomarkers of Premature Carotid Atherosclerosis.* **Sci Rep**

- Moulder R, **Bhosale SD**, et al. (2015). *Serum proteomes distinguish children developing type 1 diabetes in a cohort with HLA-conferred susceptibility.* **Diabetes**

👉 [View all 20+ publications and patent →](./cv/index.html)

---

## Awards

🏆 **Doctoral Dissertation Award** — Orion Pharma, €5,000 (2018)  
🏆 **Doctoral Dissertation Award** — Maud Kuistila Memorial Foundation, €5,000 (2018)  
🎓 **Research Grant** — Hospital District of Southwest Finland & Turku City, €3,500 (2014)  
✈️ **Travel Grant** — Turku Centre for Systems Biology, ETH Zürich Proteomics Course, €500 (2015)  
🥇 **Dr. Ashok B. Vaidya Prize** — 1st place, SAACCP Oral Session (2009)
